name: all-creatures-great-and-small
description: James Herriot's 'All Creatures Great and Small' — the beloved classic memoir of a young veterinarian in the Yorkshire Dales. One of the best-loved books of the 20th century, chronicling Herriot's first years as a country vet in 1930s England. Through calving in frozen barns, treating beloved family pets, and navigating the eccentric characters of Darrowby village, Herriot discovers a life of service, humor, and deep meaning.
